courses.title: Claude 101
courses.description: Learn how to use Claude for everyday work tasks, understand core features, and explore resources for more advanced learning on other topics.
chapters: Claude desktop app: Chat, Cowork, Code
Claude in action: use-cases by role
Other ways to work with Claude

courses.title: Claude Code 101
courses.description: Learn how to use Claude Code effectively in your daily development workflow. Covers the agentic loop, context window, tools, permissions, Explore→Plan→Code→Commit workflow, CLAUDE.md, subagents, skills, MCP servers, and hooks.

courses.title: Claude Platform 101
courses.prerequisites: Comfort reading code in at least one language, basic command-line familiarity
courses.description: Teaches developers to build on the Claude Developer Platform from the ground up. Covers API requests, model selection, agent loop, tool use, extended thinking, Skills, MCP, context management, and managed agents. Uses TypeScript SDK with runnable demos.

courses.title: Introduction to Claude Cowork
courses.description: Learn to work alongside Claude on your real files and projects. Covers Cowork task loop, skills and plugins, Chrome/Word/Excel/PowerPoint/Outlook integration, and responsible multi-step work practices.

courses.title: Claude Code in Action
courses.description: Integrate Claude Code into your development workflow

courses.title: AI Fluency: Framework & Foundations
courses.description: Learn to collaborate with AI systems effectively, efficiently, ethically, and safely. Based on AI Fluency Framework (4Ds: Delegation, Description, Discernment, Diligence).

courses.title: Building with the Claude API
courses.description: Comprehensive course covering full spectrum of working with Anthropic models using Claude API: multi-turn conversations, streaming, structured output, tool calling, RAG pipelines, hybrid search, MCP, Claude Code, Computer Use, agent architectures. Python-focused.

courses.title: Introduction to Model Context Protocol
courses.description: Learn to build modular AI applications using MCP to connect Claude with external tools and data sources. Build MCP servers (tools, resources, prompts) and clients using Python SDK.

courses.title: AI Fluency for educators
courses.description: Empowers faculty, instructional designers, and educational leaders to apply the 4D Framework to teaching practice and institutional strategy.

courses.title: AI Fluency for students
courses.description: Empowers students to develop AI Fluency skills that enhance learning, career planning, and academic success through responsible AI collaboration.

courses.title: Model Context Protocol: Advanced Topics
courses.description: Deep dive into MCP's advanced features including sampling, notifications, file system access, transport mechanisms, and production deployment strategies.

courses.title: Claude with Amazon Bedrock
courses.description: Comprehensive course covering full spectrum of working with Anthropic models via AWS Bedrock API using boto3. Covers streaming, tool use, RAG, prompt evaluation, MCP, Claude Code, Computer Use, prompt caching, extended thinking, image processing.

courses.title: Claude with Google Cloud's Vertex AI
courses.description: Comprehensive course covering working with Anthropic models through Google Cloud Vertex AI. Covers authentication, model selection, prompt evaluation, tool calling, RAG, extended thinking, citations, prompt caching, MCP, agents/workflows.

courses.title: Teaching AI Fluency
courses.description: Empowers faculty, instructional designers, and others to teach and assess AI Fluency in instructor-led settings.

courses.title: AI Fluency for nonprofits
courses.description: Empowers nonprofit professionals to develop AI fluency to increase organizational impact and efficiency while staying true to mission and values.

courses.title: Introduction to agent skills
courses.description: Learn how to build, configure, and share Skills in Claude Code — reusable markdown instructions that Claude automatically applies to the right tasks at the right time.

courses.title: Introduction to subagents
courses.description: Learn how to use and create sub-agents in Claude Code to manage context, delegate tasks, and build specialized workflows.

courses.title: AI Capabilities and Limitations
courses.description: Introductory course about how AI works. Organized around four properties: Next Token Prediction, Knowledge, Working Memory, Steerability.

courses.title: AI Fluency for Small Businesses
courses.description: Empowers small businesses to develop AI fluency to increase organizational impact and efficiency while staying true to mission and values.

courses.title: AI Fluency for Builders
courses.description: Empowers builders to develop AI fluency — increasing impact and efficiency while staying true to what it means to own the full arc from problem to shipped solution.
